title: Oxygen-TI
description:
its is a Minecraft trailer based texture pack
it's a smooth and stable texture pack.
its gives you minimal looks.
its change everything in minecraft texture.
version from 1.16-latest
body:
This time I present you "Oxygen-Ti Pack".
its is a Minecraft trailer based texture pack
it's a smooth and stable texture pack
it's a upgraded version of Oxyzen-Os.
its change all texture of Minecraft.
this pack make your Minecraft looks like minimal.
its smoothen the all Minecraft textures.
Oxygen-Ti pack clear out all animated blocks and textures.
Its reduces Animation ,Particles and Effects
more then 3000+ texture are changed.
Oxyzen-Ti is a improved version of Oxyzen-Os.

for Addional features like emission textures.
Optifine required for emission textures.

Best Shader for this texture pack are-
1]Photon
2]Complementary
3]MakeUp-UltraFast
4]Bliss

Textures are:-

1)All Blocks
2)All Trees
3)Colourmap
4)Map
5)All Particles
6)Models
7)All Effects
8)All Entites
9)Misc
10)All Paintings
11)Trims
12)Gui
13)Environment
14)All Items
15)All Armor
16)All Tools
17)All Sword
18)Shield
19)Elytra
20)All Ores
21)All Door
22)All Trapdoor
23)Emission Textures
24)Glass Door
25)Glass Trapdoor
26)Glass Boat
27)Trident
28)Enchanting Glint item
29)Enchanting Glint entity
30)Spyglass
31)Totem
32)Golden Apple
33)Tree sapling

Emission Textures required Optifine:-

1}All Ores
2}Entites Eyes

Oxygen-Ti Smooth and Stable.

This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files


Enjoy the "Oxygen-Ti Pack".

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADING.
